verification.build: gate_na: isolated restore drill script only; no code build required
verification.test: tools/verify-backup.ps1 + pg_restore -l + pg_restore --schema-only + isolated file/config/template/evidence copy with sha256 checks
verification.contractInvariant: restore uses NS801 manifest, validates source hashes, restores only to tmp/ns802-restore, and verifies restored hashes
verification.hotspot: gate_na: no real disaster recovery operator session; isolated restore drill covers non-site restore mechanics

boundary: NS802 proves the NS801 backup manifest can drive an isolated restore drill without overwriting the current database or production file store.
rollback: delete tmp\ns802-restore if this isolated restore output is no longer needed; git restore tasks/non-site-implementation-plan.csv tools/run-gates.ps1; git clean -f -- tools/run-ns802-restore-drill.ps1 docs/evidence/20260530-ns802-restore-drill-report.json
